description: The TextRenderer component shows Text in the world. An example can be created from the Create New menu, Text, then Basic or Outline.

fields.Font: The font set to use to render the text. For example, Times new Roman, or Avali Scratch.
fields.Text: The text to display. For example, "Hello world!"
fields.ParseRichText: Whether or not to interpret text formatting tags like "" for bold and "" for itallic.
fields.NullText: the text to display if ``Text`` is null. (Empty text doesn't count)
fields.Size: how big to render the text as.
fields.HorizontalAlign: How to align the text horizontally.
fields.VerticalAlign: how to align the text vertically.
fields.AlignmentMode: how to align the text within the bounding box
fields.Color: what color to render the text in.
fields.Materials: what materials to render the text as. Really only works with Unlit Text Material type.
fields.LineHeight: how much space each text line should take up
fields.Bounded: whether to restrict the text within a certain area
fields.BoundsSize: the area to use if ``Bounded`` is enabled.
fields.BoundsAlignment: how to align the text to the bounds and therefore how to handle text that spills out.
fields.MaskPattern: a string to replace every character in ``Text`` with when rendering. Useful for password fields.
fields.HorizontalAutoSize: whether to scale the text to fit the bounds horizontally
fields.VerticalAutoSize: whether to scale the text to fit the bounds vertically
fields.CaretPosition: Where the typing cursor position is within the text by character index.
fields.SelectionStart: where the selection starts if the text is being edited currently.
fields.CaretColor: the color of the typing cursor
fields.SelectionColor: the color of the typing selection.
